docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF ALL PARTIES TO APR-12-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF SARA ROGERS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CORY WILSON-DIAZ IS PRESENT. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN MEDIATION PROGRAM AND WERE STILL INTERESTED IN RESOLVING DISPUTE AMICABLY, BUT RAN OUT OF TIME AS CALENDAR ENDED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO APR-12-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROGERS, SARA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON-DIAZ, CORY $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,615.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE DEFENDANT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-26-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF SARA ROGERS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CORY WILSON-DIAZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PARTIES (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROGERS, SARA AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON-DIAZ, CORY

ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 SERVED NOV-16-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON-DIAZ, CORY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-19-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-19-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFFS SARA ROGERS APPEARED. DEFENDANT CORY WILSON-DIAZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON-DIAZ, CORY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY ROGERS, SARA AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON-DIAZ, CORY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-19-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF SARA ROGERS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CORY WILSON-DIAZ IS PRESENT. PARTIES HAVE REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT HEARING ON MAY 14TH, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROGERS, SARA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-19-2018 - JUDGMENT.
